description: Raw experimental events for cognitive tests, questionnaires, and games. An xAPI-style envelope (actor / verb / object) carrying a single canonical `bdm:` vocabulary, so one set of analytics tooling can process every domain. Continuous signals (mouse, keyboard, EEG) are referenced via attachments, not inlined.

fields.name: actor
fields.description: Who or what performed/experienced the event — `{objectType, id, name?}`, where objectType is one of the actor types below. (Renamed from `agent`; an Agent is one type of actor — BDM deviation D5.)

fields.name: verb
fields.description: The action that occurred, drawn from the canonical verb vocabulary below.

fields.name: object
fields.description: What the action was performed on — `{objectType, id, name?}`, where objectType is one of the object types below.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: When the event occurred, as an ISO 8601 / RFC 9557 datetime with timezone offset.

fields.name: result
fields.description: The outcome of the event (e.g. accuracy, response_time, score). Domain-specific payload lives under `result.extensions` keyed by `bdm:*` extension keys.

fields.name: context
fields.description: Contextual information (study, studyflow, and the session→activity→runtime→block→trial scoping hierarchy) under `context.extensions`, keyed by `bdm:*` extension keys.

fields.name: version
fields.description: The associated BDM/schema version (e.g. `v26.0608`). Typically populated by the LRS.

fields.name: stored
fields.description: When the event was stored in the LRS. Populated by the LRS.

fields.name: updated
fields.description: When the event was last updated in the LRS. Populated by the LRS.

fields.name: authority
fields.description: The authority that generated the event (e.g. the client app/developer). Populated by the LRS.

fields.name: attachments
fields.description: References to additional files/data associated with the event (stimulus blobs, recording files, timeseries), each with its own metadata. Payloads are not inlined.

verbs.name: bdm:initialized
verbs.description: RuntimeInstance record minted; instrument loaded; engine ready. Nothing shown yet.

verbs.name: bdm:started
verbs.description: First content actually shown to the participant; starts the experiential clock.

verbs.name: bdm:paused
verbs.description: RuntimeInstance suspended (extended visibility loss, idle threshold, or explicit pause).

verbs.name: bdm:resumed
verbs.description: RuntimeInstance continued after a pause. Carries bdm:pause_duration.

verbs.name: bdm:completed
verbs.description: All required content done. Distinct from submitted.

verbs.name: bdm:submitted
verbs.description: Data left the engine (POST to Orchestrator acknowledged).

verbs.name: bdm:abandoned
verbs.description: RuntimeInstance ended without completion. Carries bdm:abandon_reason.

verbs.name: bdm:presented
verbs.description: Something became perceivable (rendered or played). Typically the response-time anchor for Stimulus/Option.

verbs.name: bdm:clicked
verbs.description: Pointer click (mouse, tap, stylus); the lowest-level click event.

verbs.name: bdm:drag_and_dropped
verbs.description: A drag-and-drop gesture completed. Carries bdm:drag_source and bdm:drop_target.

verbs.name: bdm:key_pressed
verbs.description: A single key event. Carries bdm:key and bdm:key_code.

verbs.name: bdm:key_released
verbs.description: A key released after bdm:key_pressed. Carries bdm:key and bdm:key_code; press duration is derivable from the paired bdm:key_pressed timestamp.

verbs.name: bdm:typed
verbs.description: A text input was committed (debounced). Carries bdm:typed_text and bdm:key_sequence.

verbs.name: bdm:selected
verbs.description: Discrete option selected (radio, checkbox, dropdown).

verbs.name: bdm:deselected
verbs.description: Discrete option deselected (e.g. checkbox unchecked).

verbs.name: bdm:adjusted
verbs.description: A continuous-value control was set (slider, spinner, dial). Carries bdm:current_value.

verbs.name: bdm:got_focus
verbs.description: Focus gained by an input control or by the runtime window/tab.

verbs.name: bdm:lost_focus
verbs.description: Focus lost. Window-level loss may (by threshold) lead to bdm:paused.

verbs.name: bdm:consented
verbs.description: The agent committed to consent. Carries bdm:consent_text_hash and bdm:consent_scope.

verbs.name: bdm:trial_started
verbs.description: A trial began. Carries bdm:trial_index and (when applicable) bdm:block_index / bdm:block_type.

verbs.name: bdm:trial_ended
verbs.description: Trial finalised; a Response (trial) row is created. Carries the canonical response_*, response_time, correct/score, and bdm:response_id. Exactly one per trial.

verbs.name: bdm:state_changed
verbs.description: A software-internal state change not tied to a presentation (timer, scorer, locale switch).

verbs.name: bdm:recording_started
verbs.description: A continuous-data recording opened. Carries bdm:source and bdm:sample_rate.

verbs.name: bdm:recording_ended
verbs.description: A recording closed and was stored. Carries bdm:recording_url, bdm:recording_sha256, bdm:duration.

verbs.name: bdm:navigated
verbs.description: Participant moved between Screens. Carries bdm:from_screen_id and bdm:to_screen_id.

object_types.name: bdm:RuntimeInstance
object_types.description: One specific runtime execution of an Activity (distinguishes restarts).

object_types.name: bdm:Screen
object_types.description: One screen unit (questionnaire page, instructions screen, trial screen).

object_types.name: bdm:Panel
object_types.description: A within-screen layout grouping (e.g. matrix rows).

object_types.name: bdm:Stimulus
object_types.description: A displayed/audible thing the participant perceives within a trial.

object_types.name: bdm:Option
object_types.description: A response option shown to the participant (radio, checkbox, dropdown entry).

object_types.name: bdm:Trial
object_types.description: The participant-administered unit; one Response (trial) row per Trial.

object_types.name: bdm:UIComponent
object_types.description: An interactive UI control (radio, checkbox, slider, text field, button, key listener).

object_types.name: bdm:Window
object_types.description: The runtime window or browser tab (system-wide focus context).

object_types.name: bdm:Feedback
object_types.description: A post-response feedback display (correctness, score, band label, explanation).

object_types.name: bdm:ConsentForm
object_types.description: The consent form presented for review (what was shown).

object_types.name: bdm:Consent
object_types.description: The consent record — the audit entity capturing the agreement (what was committed to).

object_types.name: bdm:Recording
object_types.description: A continuous-data capture record (mouse, keyboard, EEG, …).

object_types.name: bdm:Timer
object_types.description: An internal software timer (trial timeout, idle detector).

actor_types.name: bdm:Agent
actor_types.description: A specific agent — usually the human participant; may be an AI/automated participant.

actor_types.name: bdm:Group
actor_types.description: A collection of agents acting together (xAPI compatibility; rare).

actor_types.name: bdm:Engine
actor_types.description: The runtime software acting on its own (web viewer, Godot viewer, game engine, CLI runner).

actor_types.name: bdm:Orchestrator
actor_types.description: The backend service that schedules Activities, mints RuntimeInstances, manages submission.

actor_types.name: bdm:Researcher
actor_types.description: A researcher acting on the data (post-hoc annotation/correction).
